Before doing anything else, read the file `.claude/skills/build-feature/SKILL.md` in full and follow every instruction in it precisely. That file is the single source of truth for scaffolding features in this project.

Also read all four templates in `.claude/skills/build-feature/templates/` — the skill workflow references each one.
